data.title: Eric Jackson believes Opendoor Technologies, Inc. (NASDAQ: OPEN) could be the Amazon of housing. Stock experienced pullback, with key management changes supporting a bullish outlook.
data.description: Is Opendoor Technologies, Inc. (NASDAQ: OPEN) positioned to become the housing industry's equivalent of Amazon? Eric Jackson, a prominent stock promoter, seems to think so. Despite a pullback in OPEN stock on Friday, there is growing optimism surrounding the company. Jackson outlined a bullish case for Opendoor, emphasizing recent management changes as a significant factor in his positive outlook. He highlighted the transformation in leadership as a key pillar supporting his optimism for the stock. During the Independent Investor Summit, Jackson presented his optimistic vision for the company, citing the resolved management question. For more details on this story, visit the full coverage on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Avicanna appoints Nick Hilborn as Interim CFO, replacing Phillip Cardella who transitions to consultant on Sept 15, 2025.
data.description: In Toronto on September 12, 2025, Avicanna Inc. (TSX: AVCN) (OTCQX: AVCNF) (FSE: 0NN), a biopharmaceutical firm specializing in plant-derived cannabinoid-based products, has appointed Nick Hilborn, CPA, CA, as the Interim Chief Financial Officer. This announcement follows the transition of Phillip Cardella, CPA, CA, to a consultant role effective Monday, September 15, 2025.

data.title: Cameco signs 15-year UF6 supply agreement with Slovenské elektrárne for Slovakia plants, ensuring source until 2036.
data.description: Cameco (TSX: CCO; NYSE: CCJ) has recently solidified a long-term contract to provide natural uranium hexafluoride (UF6) to Slovenské elektrárne (SE), a Slovakian energy company, for its nuclear power plants. The agreement encompasses uranium and conversion services and is set to run until 2036, ensuring a stable supply of natural UF6 for SE. This partnership will aid SE's operations at the Bohunice and Mochovce nuclear facilities, commencing in 2028.

data.title: AYR Wellness filed Q1 2025 financial statements & MD&A, for 3 months ending March 31, 2025.
data.description: On September 12, 2025, AYR Wellness Inc., a prominent U.S. multi-state cannabis operator, disclosed that it submitted its unaudited interim condensed consolidated financial statements for the quarter concluding on March 31, 2025, alongside the corresponding Management’s Discussion and Analysis (MD&A). The company is listed as CSE: AYR.A and OTCQX: AYRWF.

data.title: Tron's 64% revenue drop in 10 days after gas fee cut still puts it ahead of Ethereum, Solana, and BNB Chain in revenue.
data.description: Despite recent adjustments, Tron remains the top revenue generator among layer-1 blockchains, surpassing competitors like Ethereum, Solana, and BNB Chain. Its revenue outshines other platforms, highlighting its strong position in the market.

data.title: Steward Partners ranked #9 on Barron's Top 100 RIA Firms list, marking 6 years of recognition, showing firm's upward trajectory.
data.description: Steward Partners, an independent financial services firm based in Stamford, Connecticut, has shown significant progress by moving up in the rankings. The firm's dedication to ensuring client success is evident through this positive development. Specializing in delivering comprehensive wealth management solutions, Steward Partners' recent performance highlights its ongoing momentum and commitment. This update was announced on September 12, 2025.

data.title: Ebola outbreak in Kasai Province, DRC confirmed by National Institute of Biomedical Research, in response with Ridgeback Biotherapeutics; 16th outbreak.
data.description: In Kasai Province, an outbreak of the Ebola virus disease (EVD) has been officially declared by the Minister of Health of the Democratic Republic of the Congo (DRC). The announcement came after samples analyzed at the National Institute of Biomedical confirmed the presence of the virus. As of now, the total number of confirmed cases stands at X in the affected region. The declaration underlines the urgent need for swift response and containment measures to prevent further spread of the deadly disease.

data.title: The Lamkin Clinic in Oklahoma offers new tech to treat depression without medication. Event on Sept 25 to showcase treatment.
data.description: A showcased event on September 25 in Edmond, Oklahoma will present a new treatment option at The Lamkin Clinic. This FDA-cleared procedure offers relief for individuals dealing with depression or anxiety without the use of medication. The clinic, known for its integrative approach, aims to help patients improve their mental health. The event is set to highlight the benefits of this new treatment to attendees. Join us on September 25 to learn more about this innovative and medication-free solution for depression and anxiety.

data.title: Marlton Partners comments on 180 Degree Capital Corp. and Mount Logan Capital Inc. merger, delivering 110% of NAV.
data.description: Newly established conditions ensuring an impressive 110% of Net Asset Value (NAV) being offered are seen as a confirmation of the shareholder value provided by TURN. This update comes from Marlton Partners L.P., who possess around 5.8% of the total stock of 180 Degree Capital. This positive development is a significant boost for investors and is set to enhance the overall value proposition for TURN stakeholders.

data.title: Over 150 advocates gather at Capitol urging Governor Newsom to sign AB 7 into law addressing legacy of harm & exclusion.
data.description: Today in Sacramento, California, over 150 individuals including community leaders, students, and grassroots advocates came together on the West Steps of the California State Capitol. They urged state lawmakers to support AB 7, known as the Legacy of Harm & Exclusion Consideration Act. This gathering aimed to raise awareness and gain momentum for the bill, which addresses issues concerning harm and exclusion in the community.

data.title: Recuro Health promotes Michael Brombach to EVP & COO, emphasizing digital health platform enhancement.
data.description: In Dallas, a company specializing in virtual care solutions, Recuro Health, has recently announced the promotion of Michael Brombach to Executive Vice President and Chief Operating Officer. This move recognizes Brombach's significant contributions to the company's growth and commitment to excellence within the digital health sector.

data.title: Trump's exec actions and Musk's AI project may unleash groundbreaking tech wave, as per James Altucher.
data.description: In a recent presentation, James Altucher discussed the potential impact of Trump's executive actions and Elon Musk's AI mothership, emphasizing the possibility of sparking a highly transformative era in technology. Altucher highlights the significant influence these factors could have, suggesting they may lead to the most revolutionary wave of technological advancements in modern history.

data.title: Fed's inflation rate exceeds expectations, lowering odds of July rate cut, upsetting Trump. S&P 500 increases.(Characters: 101)
data.description: The Federal Reserve's primary inflation measure exceeded expectations, reducing the likelihood of a rate cut in July, much to the disappointment of President Trump. Meanwhile, the S&P 500 saw an increase as news of the higher inflation rate emerged. The current economic situation indicates that a change in the Fed's approach may be less probable due to these developments.

data.title: Trump family profits despite underwhelming crypto token launch; potential payment of hundreds of millions after previous deal.
data.description: The cryptocurrency token of World Liberty Financial experienced a decline below investors' expectations, failing to meet their hopes. However, a previous transaction was completed, creating a pathway for a payment to be made to the Trump family amounting to potentially hundreds of millions of dollars.

data.title: SRx Health Solutions is beginning restructuring for its Canadian subsidiary; U.S. operations, including Halo subsidiary, remain unaffected.
data.description: The CCAA Proceedings are not expected to impact U.S. operations, which includes the Halo subsidiary. No U.S. bankruptcy filing is anticipated as a result of this, ensuring stability for operations in the country. This development will safeguard jobs and investments, with no disruptions in business expected. The news provides reassurance to stakeholders and employees, emphasizing the resilience of the U.S. operations despite the ongoing CCAA Proceedings.

data.title: China quietly adds to its gold hoard, reaching $253 billion worth in August, marking 10 consecutive months of purchases.
data.description: As President Donald Trump focuses on revitalizing the U.S. economy globally, China is discreetly accumulating gold at a rapid rate, challenging the dominance of the U.S. dollar. In August, China's central bank marked its 10th consecutive month of gold purchases, boosting the precious metal's value to record levels. The People's Bank of China acquired 60,000 ounces last month, increasing its total gold reserves to 74.02 million ounces by the end of August. This move elevates China's official gold holdings, as reported by the State Administration of Foreign Exchange. This information can be found in detail on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Chair of Tesla Board defends Elon Musk’s enormous pay plan worth $1 trillion, urges shareholders’ support.
data.description: Robyn Denholm, who typically avoids media attention, is actively promoting support from shareholders for the chief executive's compensation package worth one trillion dollars.

data.title: Dow fell on inflation data, S&P 500 and Nasdaq hit records. Oracle's stock surged by 36%.
data.description: On Wednesday, the Dow Jones index experienced a decline following the release of unexpected inflation data. AI technology company Oracle saw a remarkable 36% surge in its stock value due to strong earnings. Despite the Dow's drop, both the S&P 500 and Nasdaq reached record highs. As investors awaited a crucial inflation report, the market showed mixed performance. Notably, Nvidia and Oracle stood out with significant gains.

data.title: Stock market rally at highs; Tesla speeds, Nvidia and Meta eye buy points. Federal Reserve meeting ahead.
data.description: The stock market is experiencing a surge as Tesla leads the way and Nvidia and Meta prepare for potential gains. The Dow Jones Futures are showing promise as Nvidia and Meta are approaching key buy points, while Tesla is advancing rapidly. Investors are keeping a close eye on the upcoming Federal Reserve meeting, which is a significant event in the current financial landscape. This update comes amidst a positive trend in the stock market, demonstrating notable progress and opportunities for growth for various companies.

data.title: Nasdaq hits record high; Palantir has strong week; Gemini debuts. Apple lost ground after iPhone event. Dow remains flat.
data.description: On Friday, the Dow Jones Industrial Average failed to secure any gains, with Apple experiencing a decline for the week following its iPhone event. The Nasdaq set a fresh record high during the day's trading. Palantir had a notable week showing strength in the market, while Gemini made its debut. For more financial news and updates, be sure to follow Investor's Business Daily.
